use_cases: Creating animated shine effects on card components to draw attention
Adding premium visual appeal to pricing or feature cards
Enhancing hero section elements with dynamic border animations
Decorating call-to-action buttons with pulsing border effects
Creating decorative overlays on media galleries or portfolios
ai_summary: A reusable React component that creates an animated shine border effect using CSS gradients and pseudo-elements. Supports customizable border radius, width, animation duration, and color. Uses CSS custom properties for flexibility and dark mode compatibility. Ideal for adding premium, attention-grabbing visual effects to cards, buttons, and decorative UI elements in SaaS and e-commerce applications.
